_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Pre-existing red QV gate poisons in-flight items (baseline subtraction covers only 4 gates)

steps.description: Add parse_assertion_scanner + a generic line-keyed fallback parser to qv_baseline.py and a parser_for_gate resolver (never None); wire _compute_qv_baselines and _get_qv_findings to use it so all gates get baseline subtraction.
Per-agent review of S01: assertions covered, generic fallback default, existing gates unchanged, no remaining unknown-gate skip, scope clean.
Parser unit tests (assertion scanner + generic fallback + resolver) and integration test: base-red gate suppressed, new failure surfaces.
Review S03 coverage: repro targets bug, semantic assertions, resolver-never-None invariant, testcontainer rules.
Global cross-step review: AC1-AC4 mechanically, no remaining unknown-gate no-baseline path, scope discipline.
QV: Assertion scanner (forbid new vacuous tests)
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
